sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa hong pai ding, nung ciangin: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Van inn nuam panin hong pai ding:
kithawi in hong pai ding!
Amah thuman i Topa hi, A teelsate thupha pia ding,
A Pa’ Kumpi
tokhom tu ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Mopipa hong pai ciang na kithawi
diam?
Mopipa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?
Zingsang, sun le zan hi zong, Na meivakte tangpha
in,
Mopipa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amah leitung hong pai baih ding: kithawi
in hong pai ding!
Gualzawhna ding hun hong tung ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Hallelujah van pan
ging ding, Jesuh’ gupkhiatna hong puak ciang,
Meivak hoihte’n Topa mu ding: kithawi in hong
pai ding!

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: En in, nang le kei ading hi: kithawi in hong pai ding!
A sawtlo-in pengkul
za ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Ei hong sam ding thukhen ni ciang, Gam khempeuh panmun
khempeuh-ah;
A kumpi tokhom mai ding ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
